feedback.text: I support the idea of preserving goods such as software and believe no such things deserve to be destroyed or taken away after a certain date. I'd argue it's rather anti-consumer to acquire a software of any kind only to be taken away by whoever decides so. I believe it would REALLY, really make a difference to the average consumer (myself included) if this rule can be applied, as it would really be beneficial both to any person and software preservation as a whole. Please make it happen.
